_comment: Stage 4 globalization-readiness scorecard. Evidence-derived (direct repository inspection at main e91cb1b4). Not authorization; gates token globalization. See thoughtful-seatmate-stage4-globalization-readiness.md.

criteria.name: both pilots use same values without override
no route-specific token semantics behind generic names

blockers: B1 repeated accessibility workarounds (rose-small-text removal + muted->secondary promotion) need central resolution
B2 five primitives unvalidated by production (Text, DecisionMarker, BrandMark, BrandLink, BrandSignature)
B3 token-name collision with existing global --brand-*/--bg-*/--font-*/--purple-*/--pink- system
B4 guard does not detect editorial-font / general purple chrome / contextual colour
B5 under-exercised tokens (surface-raised, brand-rose, brand-rose-contrast, decision, page-depth linear)
nonBlockingFollowups: F1 refresh stale Darwin baselines for Tonight + Film File
F2 isolated de-flake of e2e/app/discover.e2e.js:211 (watch home-focus.e2e.js:42)
F3 add authenticated visual coverage to uncovered low-risk surfaces before migrating them
safestNextStage: foundation-hardening (resolve B1-B5; no surface migration; no :root change), then the Library local pilot
globalizationLevelRecommendation: stay at Level 1-2 (foundation availability + per-route local adoption); do not do Level 3 (shell), 4 (:root promotion), or 5 (legacy retirement) next
prohibitedNext: simultaneous migration of multiple large routes
token globalization while any blocker is open
